chunks.title: Josiah's Passover Celebration
chunks.reason: Describes the preparation, execution, and significance of King Josiah's Passover.

chunks.title: Josiah's Death at Megiddo
chunks.reason: Narrates Josiah's encounter with Neco of Egypt, his wounding, death, and the subsequent lament.

chunks.title: Summary of Josiah's Reign
chunks.reason: Provides a concluding summary referencing the records of his deeds and acts.
